title: Rispwind's Sporetoise
description: Adds an adorable new mob to Mushroom Islands!
body:
Have you ever felt Mushroom Islands were just too empty despite how rare they are? Have you ever wanted a new adorable friend? Well, I have solved both issues! I present the Sporetoise!


This adorable mob was inspired by a pun I thought of in my youth. Now, it has been fully realized!


NOTE: This mob ONLY spawns in Mushroom Fields biomes, the new name of Mushroom Islands.
